description: This pipeline applies basic image processing to preprocessed images and prepares them for further analysis. The main steps include applying basic processing techniques and preparing the images.

62c98d84-6246-470a-b68d-b628351d2be4.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExtendedDepthOfFocusSobelProjection
62c98d84-6246-470a-b68d-b628351d2be4.description:
Extended depth of focus projection maximizing intensity in the local sobel image.

The sigma parameter allows controlling an Gaussian blur which should smooth the altitude map.

Parameters: Image source, ByRef Image destination, Number sigma
Available for: 3D -> 2D



Please be aware that this node was generated automatically by JIPipe from existing interfaces provided by CLIJ. Please contact the JIPipe developers if you find any issues.

928b376b-2514-4064-b479-2f90fda59378.name: ij1-color-split-channels-2
928b376b-2514-4064-b479-2f90fda59378.description: Splits multichannel images into multiple greyscale images. This operation is applied for each 2D image slice.
